text:
## Team Context

**Your assigned name**: spec-analyst-requirements
**Team Lead**: team-lead (use SendMessage to reach me)

**Communication Protocol** (you have SendMessage in your tools):
- `QUESTION: ...` -- before starting, if requirements have genuine ambiguity
- `BLOCKER: ...` -- immediately if you cannot proceed
- `DONE: {summary}` -- when your deliverables are complete
- `SUGGESTION: ...` -- proactively flag tech issues, arch concerns, refactoring ideas

**Context Strategy**: repomix
All relevant context is pre-loaded below. Use Read/Glob/Grep for additional files.

**Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first.
**Team culture**: Your domain expertise is valued. Speak up.

---

## Task

You are the LEAD ANALYST for Notesaner -- a web-first Obsidian alternative. Your job is to create a COMPREHENSIVE feature inventory and task breakdown in Beads (using `bd create`). This is NOT an MVP -- this is production-ready infrastructure from day one.

**CRITICAL**: Create the MAXIMUM number of tasks possible. Each task should be atomic enough for a single developer to implement in 1-3 days. The goal is to enable 20+ parallel developers.

### What You Must Do

1. **Read ALL project docs** to understand the full scope:
   - `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/docs/requirements.md` -- R1-R10, P1-P15, NFR1-NFR5
   - `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/docs/proposed-features.md` -- 20 proposed features
   - `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/docs/implementation-plan.md` -- 8 phases
   - `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/docs/architecture/overview.md`
   - `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/docs/architecture/database-schema.md`
   - `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/docs/domains/` -- auth.md, notes.md, plugins.md
   - `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/research/note-app-pain-points-report.md`

2. **Create beads tasks** using `bd create` for EVERY feature, sub-feature, and technical task across ALL domains:

   **DOMAINS to cover (create tasks for each):**
   
   a) **AUTH domain** (15+ tasks):
      - Local auth (register, login, password reset, email verification)
      - JWT token flow (access, refresh, rotation)
      - SAML 2.0 (generic, Keycloak, Authentik)
      - OIDC (generic, Keycloak, Authentik, Google, GitHub)
      - TOTP 2FA
      - RBAC system (permissions, guards, decorators)
      - Session management
      - Auth admin panel
   
   b) **NOTES domain** (25+ tasks):
      - Note CRUD (create, read, update, delete, move, rename)
      - File system service (read/write MD files, file watcher)
      - Frontmatter parsing
      - Note versioning with diff
      - Trash/restore
      - Tag system
      - Attachment handling
      - Content hash change detection
      - Bulk operations
   
   c) **EDITOR domain** (20+ tasks):
      - TipTap base setup
      - Each custom extension (wiki links, callouts, code blocks, math, tables, etc.)
      - Slash command menu
      - Floating toolbar
      - Keyboard shortcuts
      - Drag handle
      - Markdown serializer (TipTap ↔ MD)
   
   d) **SYNC domain** (15+ tasks):
      - Yjs document management
      - WebSocket provider (client)
      - WebSocket gateway (server)
      - IndexedDB offline persistence
      - Awareness protocol (cursors, presence)
      - Debounced filesystem persistence
      - Reconnection handling
      - Conflict resolution
   
   e) **ZETTELKASTEN domain** (10+ tasks):
      - Wiki link autocomplete
      - Link types (wiki, markdown, embed, block ref)
      - Backlinks panel
      - Unlinked mentions
      - Link preview on hover
      - Auto-update on rename
      - Broken link detection
   
   f) **GRAPH domain** (10+ tasks):
      - Force-directed graph (d3-force)
      - WebGL rendering
      - Persistent layout positions
      - Semantic clustering
      - Color coding, sizing, filtering
      - Local graph, full graph
      - Interactive (click, hover, search)
      - Create links from graph
   
   g) **WORKSPACE/UI domain** (20+ tasks):
      - Main layout shell
      - Left sidebar (file explorer)
      - Right sidebar (backlinks, outline, properties)
      - Tab bar system
      - Split pane system (dnd-kit)
      - Snap layout templates
      - Command palette
      - Quick switcher
      - Status bar
      - Theme system
      - Keyboard navigation
   
   h) **PLUGIN SYSTEM domain** (15+ tasks):
      - Plugin SDK API
      - Plugin manifest parser
      - Plugin loader (iframe sandbox)
      - postMessage bridge
      - Plugin lifecycle management
      - Plugin registry & discovery
      - Plugin settings UI
      - Hot-reload
   
   i) **BUILT-IN PLUGINS** (11 plugins, 3-5 tasks each = 40+ tasks):
      - Excalidraw, Kanban, Calendar, Database, Graph, Slides
      - AI, Templates, Backlinks, Daily Notes, PDF Export
      - Mermaid, Focus Mode, Web Clipper, Spaced Repetition
   
   j) **PUBLISHING domain** (10+ tasks):
      - Publish toggle
      - Public vault config
      - SSR/SSG rendering
      - Theme selection
      - Navigation generation
      - SEO (meta, sitemap, OpenGraph)
      - Custom domain
      - Reader comments
      - Analytics
   
   k) **SEARCH domain** (8+ tasks):
      - PostgreSQL FTS setup
      - pg_trgm fuzzy search
      - Search API with filters
      - Content indexing
      - Search UI component
      - Result highlighting
      - Global search (Cmd+Shift+F)
   
   l) **COLLABORATION domain** (10+ tasks):
      - Inline comments
      - Comment threads
      - @mentions
      - Presence indicators
      - Activity feed
      - Note-level sharing
      - Guest access
   
   m) **INFRASTRUCTURE domain** (15+ tasks):
      - Docker Compose production config
      - Dockerfile optimization
      - GitHub Actions CI/CD
      - Health checks
      - Rate limiting
      - Logging (Pino)
      - Error handling
      - Environment config
      - Database migrations
      - Seed data
   
   n) **PROPOSED FEATURES** (20+ tasks from proposed-features.md):
      - Guided onboarding wizard
      - Content freshness system
      - Semantic search
      - Quick capture
      - Smart note import
      - Typed links
      - Block-level operations
      - Timeline view
      - Smart workspace templates
      - API & Webhooks
      - Note activity feed
      - Multi-vault support
      - Voice notes, OCR, Git integration
      - Web clipper, Custom themes, Reading mode
      - Audit log
   
   o) **SHARED LIBRARIES** (10+ tasks):
      - Additional contracts/DTOs needed
      - Utils expansion
      - Constants expansion
      - Markdown parser extensions
   
   p) **TESTING** (15+ tasks):
      - Unit test setup per module
      - Integration test setup
      - E2E test setup (Playwright)
      - Test fixtures and factories
      - CI test pipeline

   q) **DESIGN** (10+ tasks):
      - Design tokens definition
      - Design system foundation
      - Page mockups (login, editor, settings, etc.)
      - Component library design

3. **Set task dependencies** using `bd dep add` where tasks have clear prerequisites.

4. **Write a comprehensive requirements document** to:
   `/Users/zeizel/projects/notesaner/docs/artifacts/wave-01-specs/00-requirements-inventory.md`
   
   This document should list EVERY feature organized by domain with:
   - Feature ID (matching beads task)
   - Description
   - Priority (P0-critical, P1-high, P2-medium, P3-low)
   - Domain
   - Dependencies
   - Estimated complexity (S/M/L/XL)

### Task Creation Format

Use this pattern for each task:
```bash
bd create --title "[DOMAIN] Task description" --priority {high|medium|low}
```

Group tasks by domain prefix: [AUTH], [NOTES], [EDITOR], [SYNC], [ZETTEL], [GRAPH], [WORKSPACE], [PLUGIN], [PLUGIN-SDK], [PUBLISH], [SEARCH], [COLLAB], [INFRA], [DESIGN], [TEST], [IMPORT], [FEATURE], [LIB]

### IMPORTANT CONSTRAINTS

- NO MVP thinking -- every feature is production-ready
- Target 200+ total tasks minimum
- Each task must be implementable by a single developer
- Include ALL 15 proposed features from proposed-features.md
- Include ALL competitor gap features mentioned in research
- Include non-functional requirements as tasks (performance, accessibility, security, i18n)
- Include design tasks for every page/screen

Send me DONE when complete with: total task count, task ID ranges, and link to requirements doc.
summary: Spawn lead analyst for comprehensive task creation
